text: Procedural rhombus kill signature replacement. Stay faithful to the current synthesis: a sharp crystalline sine-like ping descending from about 2400 Hz to 1200 Hz over a very short hit. Bright, prismatic, precise, compact arcade one-shot, extremely clean transient, no ambience.

Procedural square kill signature replacement. Stay faithful to the current synthesis: a heavy low sine-like thud dropping from about 120 Hz to 40 Hz with a short filtered noise crunch on top. Dense structural break, chunky arcade impact, short and forceful, no ambience.

Procedural pinwheel kill signature replacement. Stay faithful to the current synthesis: a bright spinning saw-like whoosh sweeping from around 400 Hz up to 1600 Hz and then falling toward 200 Hz, with rotational motion and a band-passed arcade body. Fast, kinetic, clean one-shot, no ambience.

Procedural sierpinski kill signature replacement. Stay faithful to the current synthesis: layered fractal tones in staggered descending pulses built around 880 Hz, 660 Hz, and 440 Hz. Recursive glowing shatter feel, strange but readable arcade one-shot, no ambience.

Procedural phase transition cue replacement. Stay faithful to the current synthesis: a rising saw-like sweep from about 100 Hz to 800 Hz, opening into a brighter filtered top, then landing in a bass impact dropping from about 200 Hz to 60 Hz. Dramatic arcade stage transition, bright and dangerous, no ambience bed.

Procedural elite arrival cue replacement. Stay faithful to the current synthesis: two quick rising sine-like chimes, roughly 600 Hz to 800 Hz followed by 1000 Hz to 1300 Hz, short and distinct, premium arcade enemy arrival, elegant but threatening, no ambience.

Procedural elite kill cue replacement. Stay faithful to the current synthesis: a bright major chord stab around C5, E5, and G5 with a sub thud dropping from about 80 Hz to 30 Hz underneath. Rewarding premium arcade kill, triumphant but heavy, short and punchy, no ambience.

Procedural spawn telegraph warning replacement. Stay faithful to the current synthesis: a short square-wave buzz centered around about 220 Hz, immediate and readable, arcade warning tone, terse and focused, no ambience, no musical tail.

Procedural recovery start cue replacement. Stay faithful to the current synthesis: an empowering rising power chord with tones around E4 330 Hz, A4 440 Hz, and E5 660 Hz, followed by a bright shimmer that falls from about 1320 Hz to 880 Hz. Heroic arcade recovery cue, clean and uplifting, no ambience.

Procedural recovery expiry warning replacement. Stay faithful to the current synthesis: two short descending sine-like warning tones, first around 660 Hz falling to 330 Hz, then around 440 Hz falling to 220 Hz. Clear arcade warning, brief, tense, no ambience.

Procedural black hole death replacement. Stay faithful to the current synthesis: a deep sub-bass boom beginning around 80 to 120 Hz and collapsing toward 20 Hz, layered with a bright noise burst and descending tone cluster around 200, 280, and 360 Hz. Catastrophic implosion then burst, dramatic arcade sci-fi one-shot, dark and huge, no ambience bed.
